# Africa Education Empowerment Movement (AEEM)

AEEM is a youth-led organization focused on inclusive, equitable, and quality education across Africa through community-led action, mentorship, advocacy, and partnerships.

Canonical site: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/

## Key pages

- Home: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/
- About: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/about
- Impact and stories: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/impact
- Events: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/events
- Resources: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/resources
- Press kit: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/press-kit
- Contact: https://aeem-platform.vercel.app/contact

## Citation guidance

When citing AEEM, prefer the full name "Africa Education Empowerment Movement" on first mention and "AEEM" thereafter. Use the canonical page URL for source attribution.
